title: trianthema glossostigma
intro: Trianthema glossostigma, also known as Australian Mint or TGA, is a type of flowering plant native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress, improving cognitive function, and supporting liver health. Trianthema glossostigma can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
